package rulefixtures

import (
	"context"
)

// scenario for tracing_span_names_duplicated_as_raw_strings: Repeated raw span-name literals across handlers and services.
// fixture polarity: negative; family: architecture; severity: info.
type Rule206NegativeRecord struct {
	TenantID string
	Limit int
}

type Rule206NegativeService interface {
	Run(context.Context, Rule206NegativeRecord) error
}

func scenario206Negative(ctx context.Context, service Rule206NegativeService, input Rule206NegativeRecord) error {
	if input.Limit <= 0 {
		input.Limit = 50
	}
	return service.Run(ctx, input)
}
